news.title: Why a 2017 Linux bug is now a major concern for the crypto industry
news.summary: The “Copy Fail” Linux bug could impact crypto infrastructure that relies on Linux servers, highlighting growing cybersecurity risks in the digital asset industry. Format: Expla
